description: Check-in to your riverside camp and enjoy a local cafe crawl.
A 12km trek to the natural hot springs with breathtaking views.
Visit the holy hot springs at Manikaran and board your return bus.
Pickup from Kochi airport and transfer to Munnar tea gardens.
Visit Eravikulam National Park and Mattupetty Dam.
A day of cruising the backwaters on a private luxury houseboat.
Final shopping and transfer to Kochi airport for departure.
